title: Len Deighton, best-selling novelist with wry take on espionage, dies at 97
summary_full: His books of betrayal and deception, including “The Ipcress File,” skewered espionage services and sharply mocked English social strictures.
summary_public: His books of betrayal and deception, including “The Ipcress File,” skewered espionage services and sharply mocked English social strictures.
